en.title: Hi, I am Justin Chow!
en.description: I am in my final year of a Computer Engineering degree with a specialization in Signal Processing and Communications at the University of Waterloo. I am also an upcoming Master's student at the University of Toronto. I have experience in embedded systems and software development. I enjoy designing systems and solving problems! I am interested in communications and networks, particularly how they can be used in off-grid remote locations.
